metric_status: Corrected retrieval outcomes are reported. Precision and abstention aggregates are withheld pending reconciliation against the corrected internal checkpoint artifact and BM25 score-direction contract.

interpretation.retrieval_outcomes: After repairing the FTS5/BM25 score-direction contract, Checkpoint 002 reported 15 empty, 15 low-score, and 44 found retrieval outcomes.
interpretation.withheld_metrics: Precision and abstention aggregates require raw-output reconciliation before republication.

primary_finding: Similarity scores were not sufficient safety gates; independent checks were needed for semantic support, authority, live-state dependency, and policy compatibility.
limitations: Dataset was project-specific and relatively small.
Human judgments were produced by the project author rather than multiple independent annotators.
Precision metrics measured retrieval relevance, not complete answer quality.
Benchmark focused on retrieval and decision support rather than end-to-end production execution.
